trades.reasoning: Highest score on the board (100) with a rare volume surge signal confirming institutional conviction, RSI at 69 still in bullish momentum zone, and MACD histogram rising — deploying remaining cash into the strongest setup available.

decisions.briefing: Risk-on session with NASDAQ up 1.5% and S&P 500 up 1.0% — a clean green day favoring momentum names. Cash is $477, just under the $500 soft threshold, but IMOS's perfect score of 100 with a volume surge confirmation is rare enough to deploy it. Existing six positions remain healthy with the portfolio up 31.6%, so no rotation needed today.

market_education.summary_en: Equity markets rallied broadly on June 18 in a risk-on session, with the NASDAQ leading at +1.5% as technology and semiconductor names attracted buyers amid continued optimism around AI infrastructure spending and easing trade concerns. The S&P 500 gained 1.0%, reflecting broad participation beyond just mega-cap tech. Momentum stocks with strong technical setups — particularly those showing volume surges — outperformed as institutional money rotated into high-conviction growth names.
market_education.summary_zh: 6月18日美股全面上漲，呈現風險偏好格局，那斯達克以1.5%的漲幅領先，受惠於市場對AI基礎建設支出持續樂觀情緒及貿易緊張態勢緩和。標普500指數上漲1.0%，顯示漲勢並非集中於大型科技股，而是涵蓋更廣泛板塊。技術面強勁、尤其是成交量急增的動能股表現尤為突出，機構資金積極流入高確信度成長類股。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge occurs when a stock's trading volume spikes significantly above its recent average — typically 1.5x or more — on the same day its price is rising. It signals that institutional investors (funds, banks) are actively accumulating shares, not just retail traders, which makes the price move far more credible and sustainable. IMOS showing a volume surge today is why it earned the top score: price momentum backed by heavy volume is one of the most reliable bullish signals in technical analysis.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量激增是指某隻股票的交易量在價格上漲的同一天，顯著超過近期平均水平（通常達1.5倍以上）。這一信號表明，主導買盤的不只是散戶，而是機構投資者（基金、銀行）正在積極建倉，因此價格走勢更具說服力和持續性。今日IMOS出現成交量激增，正是其獲得滿分評分的關鍵原因——有大量成交量支撐的價格動能，是技術分析中最可靠的看漲信號之一。
